prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/301-doc.pages in Pages. Insert a 3-row by 3-column table into the document body (Insert menu > Table, or via the toolbar). Save. You may use: cerebellum 'pages insert_table ~/Desktop/kinbench/301-doc.pages 3 3'. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/301-table-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
